name: Volvo
philosophy: Volvo's web presence is Scandinavian-minimalist automotive — the iron-mark logo, a near-monochrome chrome with pure-white canvas and dark gray ink, and considered photography in muted Nordic palettes (forests, fjords, twilight). The atmosphere is human-centric safety + design restraint; the cars are photographed in environments that suggest the family, the journey, and the values they exist to protect.

design_language.motion_signature: Considered editorial motion — fade-in reveals on scroll (350ms ease-out), slow crossfade carousels (1.5s). Configurator changes use 250ms ease. The brand reads as Scandinavian-deliberate, never kinetic.

trademark_signals: Iron-mark logo (the circle with the arrow) — the brand mark
Volvo Novum — proprietary geometric humanist sans
Scandinavian-minimal chrome — pure white canvas, dark gray ink, muted-cool secondary palette
Photography in Nordic environments (forests, fjords, twilight, snow)
Configurator with model variants (sedan, wagon, SUV) and trim levels
ai_slop_avoided: Don't add saturated chromatic accents — Volvo chrome is monochrome + cool-tone secondary
Don't sanitize the Nordic photography environments — they are the brand atmosphere
Don't replace Volvo Novum with Helvetica — the geometric humanist proportions are signature
Don't add kinetic motion — Volvo reads as deliberate, not fast
